name: Chinese Chicken and Walnut Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 bunch nappa cabbage or Chinese cabbage
2 cups chicken breast, cooked and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dressing ingredients in a small bowl and blend well.
2. Refrigerate the dressing until ready to use.
3. Wash spinach thoroughly and remove stems. Slice into 1/2 inch strips.
4. Wash and core cabbage. Slice into 1/2 inch pieces.
5. Dry cabbage in the refrigerator for crispness.
6. In a large bowl, combine greens, carrots, walnuts, sweet red pepper, scallions, and chicken.
7. Toss well to combine.
8. Add dressing to taste and gently toss again.
9. Reserve any leftover dressing in a covered glass container in the refrigerator.
